hero.title: IATF zawm
hero.lead: Membership hi a inhawng a. Assistive technology-a in innghat emaw, accessible software siam emaw, project lehlin emaw, enchhin emaw, enkawl emaw pawh ni se, tel theih dan kawng hrang hrang a awm a. Inbiakna leh thutlukna te hi GitHub leh Discord-ah hian mipui hmaah a awm thin a.

items: Project pakhat dîl rawh. Public open source software-in a tihbo theih theih theih lohna a awm chuan, request intake hmangin thawn rawh.
Enchhinna leh ennawnna. IATF project-te chu i hman ṭanpuitu thiamna hmanga hmang chhin la, a ṭangkai leh ṭangkaih loh chu han report la, harsatna awmte chu a ṭul anga repository-a file rawh.
A lehlin rawh. Source content hi plain English-a chhuah hmasak a ni a. A lehlin te hi Spanish-a ṭan a, a ziaktu te an awm veleh dah belh a ni ang.
Din chhuah rawh. IATF repository-a harsatna awmte zawng chhuak la, pull request thawn la, project engemaw chu engineer-in a enkawl ang che.
Tihnghehin awm rawh se. Project awm tawhte hian maintainer thar an mamawh fo a. Maintainer rotation hi model pangngai a ni a, a danglamna a ni lo.

header.title: IATF-in mipui hmunah hna a thawhna hmun

items: GitHub-ah. Issue te, pull request te, release te, leh project record te.
Inlaichînna a awm lo. Inlaichînna, inremna, leh zawhna mumal lo te.
E-mail hmangin. A hman dân contact@iatf.cc GitHub emaw, Discord emaw a inmil lo a nih chuan.

header.title: I thawhpui duh ang chi channel chu thlang rawh

paragraphs: Channels zawng zawng chu mipuite ennawnna hmun leh public repository-ahte a inlet vek a ni.
